scripts.build: pnpm --filter @akep/sdk build && pnpm --filter @akep/mcp-server build && pnpm --filter @akep/core build && pnpm --filter @akep/web build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm docs:check && pnpm worker:check && pnpm sdk:check
scripts.sdk:check: pnpm --filter @akep/sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter @akep/mcp-server typecheck && PYTHONPATH=packages/sdk-python python -m unittest discover -s packages/sdk-python/tests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @akep/sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter @akep/mcp-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @akep/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @akep/web typecheck
scripts.worker:check: uv run --project workers/knowledge-worker --group dev ruff check workers/knowledge-worker/src workers/knowledge-worker/tests && uv run --project workers/knowledge-worker --group dev pytest workers/knowledge-worker/tests
